title: Odour Neutraliser - Aqua & Bubble Gum Odour Killer - North Star Supplies-Bubble Gum 5 LTR
features: Bamboo Wall Mounted Key Box Organiser Storage Cabinet Hooks Keys Holder Cupboard
description: Odour Neutraliser can be used to eliminate odours on virtually all types of fabrics including carpets, upholstery, car interiors, curtains, blinds, waste bins and clothing. Ideal for the deodorising and sterilising of mufti-user sportswear (eg. Ice Skates, Trainers, Face Masks etc). Available in 2 fragrances - Bubble Gum & Aqua. DIRECTIONS: Odour Neutraliser should be used through a mini jet, and sprayed in a fine mist into the vehicle, cab or boot areas or any other rooms requiring treatment. Spray onto surface and allow drying time. No other treatment is necessary.
